It is sometimes convenient to think about curvature as an operator
Scalar curvature is a function on any Riemannian manifold
Ricci curvature is a linear operator on tangent space at a point
The Weyl curvature tensor has the same symmetries as the Riemann curvature tensor, but with one extra constraint
The Weyl tensor is invariant with respect to a conformal change of metric
